title: Al-Ashtar Sends 'A'ishah a He-Camel He Had Bought for Her and Her Exit from a1-Basrah to Mecca
description: He Had Bought for Her and Her Exit from al-Basrah to Mecca According to Abu Kurayb Muhammad b. al-`Ala'-Yahya b. Adam-Abu Bakr b. `Ayyash-'ASim b. Kulayb-his father: When they had finished on the Day of the Camel al-Ashtar ordered me to go and buy him a he-camel for 700 dirhams from a man from Mahrah.1056 "Take it to `A'ishah," said al-Ashtar, "and tell her, 'AlAshtar Malik b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 16
